responses.question_text: What, if anything, would you most like to see improved in body wash or shower gel products?
responses.raw_answer: I would most like to see body washes improve their scent quality to be more natural and refreshing like lavender or mogra, and also be gentler on sensitive skin without harsh chemicals.
